title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd:
NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd!
